title: Attentive To The Block! - v1
description: "Attentive To The Block" is a texture pack specifically designed to help Minecraft players identify suspicious blocks while excavating ruins in search of treasures.
body:
"Attentive To The Block" is a texture pack specifically designed to help Minecraft players identify suspicious blocks while excavating ruins in search of treasures. These suspicious blocks can be difficult to distinguish from the rest, which can lead to mistakes while mining.

 

Java Edition 1.20 and above | v1.0 | By: Pixel Studios & [Sr. Pixel](https://youtube.com/@srpixelyt_)
